examples: While I was running through the park, another jogger bumped into me.
The difference between a jogger and a runner is an entry blank.
Ireland looks like an abstemious jogger that has suffered a heart attack.
Mr. Fleming-Wood, 44 years old, notes that he is a runner, not a jogger.
At a steady pace of 6 mph, it would take a jogger 173 days to circle the earth.
